problem: What membrane material filters all contaminants from water at low energy cost?
hypothesis: Polymer crosslinking under specific stimulus may resolve What membrane material filters all contaminants from water at low energy cost? by activating at the molecular level.

experiment.protocol: In vitro biocompatibility assay with 3 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The important thing is not to stop questioning. — Einstein
